title: Chinna Chinna Aasai Lyrics Roja
stanzas:
[Chinna chinna aasai
siragadikkum aasai
muthu muthu aasai
mudinthu vaitha aasai

vennilave thottu
muththamida aasai.
ennai indha boomi
sutri vara aasai. ] (2)

Chinna chinna aasai
siragadikkum aasai
muthu muthu aasai
mudinthu vaitha aasai

vennilave thottu
muththamida aasai.
ennai indha boomi
sutri vara aasai.

Chinna chinna aasai
siragadikkum aasai
muthu muthu aasai
mudinthu vaitha aasai

saetru vayal aadi
naatru nada aasai.
meen pidithu meendum
aatril vida aasai.

Chinna chinna aasai
siragadikkum aasai
muthu muthu aasai
mudinthu vaitha aasai

vennilave thottu
muththamida aasai.
ennai indha boomi
sutri vara aasai.

seo.title: Chinna Chinna Aasai Lyrics Roja
seo.description: Full Chinna Chinna Aasai songs lyrics, Roja Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vairamuthu, Music: AR Rahman, Singer(s): Minmini.
seo.keywords: Vairamuthu, Roja, AR Rahman, Minmini, Chinna Chinna Aasai full lyrics, Roja songs lyrics, Chinna Chinna Aasai lyrics snippets, Chinna Chinna Aasai WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Chinna Chinna Aasai lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Chinna Chinna Aasai expresses simple desires and dreams, reflecting the innocence and aspirations of life.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Roja, the song symbolizes the protagonist's longing for a better life and her dreams amidst challenges.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Minmini and composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

When was the song released?

Chinna Chinna Aasai was released on May 11, 1992, as part of the Roja soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Chinna Chinna Aasai, the protagonist expresses her simple yet profound dreams, capturing the essence of hope and innocence. The song's upbeat melody and joyful lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia, making it a beloved classic. It beautifully conveys the emotions of longing and aspiration, resonating with listeners of all ages. As part of the iconic film Roja, this track remains a timeless favorite in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chinna Chinna Aasai from Roja is a delightful melody that captures the essence of simple dreams and aspirations. With Minmini's enchanting vocals and AR Rahman's magical composition, this song takes you on a nostalgic journey filled with joy and hope. Experience the vibrant energy and heartfelt lyrics that make this track a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: Little little desires that can fly high, desires that are like pearls, desires that are fulfilled.
Desire to kiss the moon, desire to travel around this earth.
Desire to change the jasmine flower, desire to feel the breeze.
Desire to touch the clouds, desire to let go of all sorrows.
